title: M5-T2: Build medical reports, expertises, and patient evolution tracking with trend charts
Forms: Map 422 server validation errors to form fields on all form pages
description: No form page maps Laravel 422 validation errors to individual fields. All forms only show generic toast on validation failure. Affected pages: New/Edit Patient, New Consultation, New Prescription, New Certificate, New Payment, New Invoice, New Expense, New/Edit Medication, New Report, New Expertise. Fix: Create shared utility to map Laravel 422 error response to React Hook Form setError() calls. Est: Medium.

title: Implement Doctor report controllers: MedicalReportController + ExpertiseController + EvolutionController
description: MedicalReportController: CRUD + PDF export + partage_patient toggle. ExpertiseController: CRUD + expertise_attachments multi-file upload + status tracking (en_cours/termine). EvolutionController: CRUD + chronological timeline + trend data for charts.

title: Implement Doctor::StatisticsController with dashboard KPIs and Excel export
description: Methods: dashboard(), revenue(), appointments(), patients(), export(). Aggregate queries: patient count/growth, daily/weekly/monthly revenue, top medical acts, no-show rate, peak hours, collection rate, outstanding balances. Export via Maatwebsite Excel + PDF.

title: M5-T1: Build analytics and statistics dashboard (Recharts charts, Excel/PDF export, date range filtering)
Implement Doctor operations controllers: MedicationController + ExpenseController
description: MedicationController: CRUD + stock tracking + low stock alerts + expiration monitoring. ExpenseController: CRUD + expense categories + receipt upload (receipt_path via Backblaze B2) + supplier management.

title: Consultation detail: Fix vital value falsy check hiding value 0
description: Consultation detail page (consultations/[id]/page.tsx): Vital component treats 0 as falsy with 'if (!value)' — should be 'if (value == null)'. Also: Certificate detail page has same issue with nombre_jours falsy check hiding value 0. Fix: Use nullish checks instead of falsy checks for numeric values. Est: Small.

title: M3-T5: Build assistant interface (teal TailAdmin theme, 4-module navigation, simplified forms)
M2-T1: Build patient management module (CRUD, Meilisearch search, photo upload, DR-XXXX file numbers)
Create all Eloquent models with relationships, scopes, casts, and tenant traits
description: Models needed: Patient, Appointment, Consultation, Certificate, Prescription, PrescriptionItem, Payment, Invoice, InvoiceItem, Medication, Expense, ExpenseCategory, MedicalReport, Expertise, ExpertiseAttachment, Evolution, DoctorPatientLink, PatientPermission, PushNotification, City. Each must: use BelongsToTenant trait, define relationships, define casts, define fillable.

title: M1-T3: Create all database migrations (29 tables from legacy + new SaaS schema)
Doctor Layout: Add top header bar with notifications and user dropdown
description: Doctor Layout has no header bar. Missing: user info display, notification bell, hamburger toggle for mobile, global search. Fix: Create top header bar component integrated with layout. Est: Medium.

title: Consultations list: Add missing New Consultation button
description: Consultations list page (consultations/page.tsx) has no 'New Consultation' button in PageHeader. Users cannot create new consultations from the list view. Fix: Add action button to PageHeader. Est: Small.

title: M3-T1: Build payment management module (REGLEMENTS migration, payment methods, partial payments, receipts)
M2-T5: Build prescription (ordonnance) management (medication list, dosage, templates, PDF, mobile access)
Documents: Fix toggleShare hook bypassing cache invalidation
description: Documents list page (app/[locale]/(doctor)/doctor/documents/page.tsx) has toggleShare hook instantiated incorrectly — raw api.patch() bypasses TanStack Query cache invalidation. Toggling share status doesn't update UI until page refresh. Fix: Use proper mutation with query cache invalidation. Est: Small.

title: Schema gaps fix: expertise_attachments, cities, missing FKs, prescription templates, invoice-payment link, receipt_path
description: Fixed via migration 2026_02_24_200000: Added expertise_attachments table, cities table, FK on appointments.created_by, FK on patients.patient_account_id, payments.invoice_id FK, prescription_items.medication_id FK, prescriptions.is_template+template_name, expenses.receipt_path, index on patients.nom_complet

title: Sidebar: Group navigation items into logical sections
description: DoctorSidebar nav items are a flat list with no grouping. Should be organized into sections: Main (Dashboard), Patients (Patients, Appointments, Consultations), Documents (Prescriptions, Certificates, Reports), Financial (Payments, Invoices, Expenses), Operations (Medications), Settings. Est: Small.

title: Fix 401 login error: seed admin@doctor.com test account
description: admin@doctor.com does not exist in DB. TestUserSeeder not called by DatabaseSeeder. Fix: add admin@doctor.com to TestUserSeeder, wire it into DatabaseSeeder, run seed.

title: M1-T5: Set up Next.js 14 + TailAdmin with i18n (FR/AR/EN), RTL support, and dual color themes
M1-T1: Set up Laravel 11 project with multi-tenancy middleware
M4-T5: Integrate OneSignal push notifications (10 event types: reminders, booking, prescriptions, stock alerts)
Expenses list: Add date range picker to replace fixed current-month filter
description: Expenses list page (expenses/page.tsx) has date range fixed to current month with no date picker to change. Pagination shows no current page or total. KPIs computed client-side from current page only (inaccurate). Fix: Add date range picker component, fix pagination indicators, use server-side KPI aggregates. Est: Medium.

title: Add invoice_items migration (missing from initial schema)
Accessibility: Add aria-label to all icon-only buttons across all pages
description: GX-5: ~40+ icon-only buttons across all pages have no aria-label. WCAG violation. Affected: back buttons, edit buttons, delete buttons, print buttons, stock adjusters, filter buttons, receipt links. Fix: Add aria-label to every icon-only Button globally. Est: Medium.

title: M5-T5: Run full test suite and performance optimization (Pest, Vitest, Sentry, CI/CD GitHub Actions)
Prescriptions new: Add medication autocomplete from database
description: New Prescription form: medication lines are free-text only, no autocomplete from the medications database. Would improve UX by suggesting existing medications with dosage info. Est: Medium.

title: M5-T4: Set up audit logging and security hardening (Activitylog, 2FA TOTP, Moroccan law compliance)
Create CitySeeder with 64+ Moroccan cities (Casablanca, Rabat, Fez, Marrakech, etc.)
description: PRD Appendix 22.H references Villes table. Cities table now exists, needs seed data for patient city dropdown.

title: Doctor Layout: Add mobile responsive behavior and drawer navigation
description: Doctor Layout (app/[locale]/(doctor)/layout.tsx) has zero breakpoint classes and no mobile overlay/drawer. Sidebar always visible, consuming full viewport on mobile. No header bar (user info, notifications, hamburger toggle). Content padding fixed at p-6 (too much on small screens). Fix: Add hamburger menu + Sheet drawer for mobile, top header bar with notifications/user dropdown/global search, breadcrumb trail in header, dark mode toggle, responsive padding. Also fix DoctorSidebar (components/layouts/DoctorSidebar.tsx) which has no mobile drawer behavior — static aside always renders. Est: Large.

title: Unsaved changes guard: Create useUnsavedChanges hook for all form pages
description: GX-9: No beforeunload handler on any form page. Navigating away from dirty forms loses data silently. Affected: all new/edit pages (patients, consultations, prescriptions, certificates, payments, invoices, expenses, medications, reports, expertises). Fix: Create useUnsavedChanges hook with beforeunload + router event interception. Est: Small.

title: Add HasApiTokens trait to User model for Sanctum
description: User model missing Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens trait. LoginController calls \->tokens() and \->createToken() which don't exist without this trait. Fix: add 'use Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens;' import and trait to class.

title: M2-T4: Set up PDF generation engine (DomPDF/Browsershot, cabinet branding, Arabic font support)
M4-T4: Build document access and analyses upload (RN PDF viewer, Expo Camera, 10MB limit, per-doctor sharing)
Forms: Add patient selector to Prescriptions, Certificates, and Payments new pages
description: Multiple form pages have patient_id defaulting to 0 with no patient selector UI: New Prescription (prescriptions/new) — patient_id defaults to 0, no patient context shown. New Certificate (certificates/new) — patient_id defaults to 0, no patient context. New Payment (payments/new) — reads patient_id from URL, defaults to 0. Fix: Add patient search/select combobox to all three forms, display patient info banner. Est: Medium.

title: Implement Doctor::PatientController + Doctor::ConsultationController (core medical CRUD)
description: PatientController: CRUD + search (Scout/Meilisearch) + photo upload + auto DR-XXXX numbering + patient_account_id FK. ConsultationController: CRUD with all 24 diabetology fields + byPatient() + audit logging. Must use tenant scoping, Form Requests, API Resources.

title: Appointments: Add missing accessibility attributes to view toggle buttons
description: Appointments page view toggle buttons (calendar/list) lack accessibility attributes: no aria-label, aria-pressed, role=tab. Empty state has no illustration for calendar view, no 'New Appointment' CTA in list empty state. Fix: Add proper ARIA roles and states to toggle. Est: Small.

title: M4-T3: Build appointment booking flow (multi-doctor, RN Calendars, time slot selection, Lottie confirmation)
Locale routing: Fix all router.push and Link href paths to include locale prefix
description: GX-6: All router.push() and Link href calls use paths like /doctor/patients/new without [locale] prefix. Broken for ar/en locales. Scope: All page.tsx files + DoctorSidebar.tsx. Fix: Use next-intl Link component or locale-aware router helper everywhere. Est: Medium.

title: Skeleton: Create reusable Skeleton component and layout-matching loading states
description: GX-8: Loading states use raw animate-pulse divs. No reusable Skeleton component. Most loading states are minimal (single grey rectangle). Fix: Create components/ui/skeleton.tsx and implement layout-matching skeletons on all pages. Est: Medium.

title: Medications list: Fix window.location.href navigation to use Next.js router
description: Medications list page handleEdit uses window.location.href instead of Next.js router, causing full page reload on edit navigation. Also: KPI fetch retrieves 200 records client-side just for counts (should be dedicated endpoint). Fix: Use router.push(), create dedicated KPI endpoint. Est: Small.

title: Medications: Fix unused useDeactivateMedication and missing deactivation UI
description: Medications list page imports useDeactivateMedication hook but never uses it — no deactivation UI exists. No error handling for failed API calls. Fix: Add deactivation flow with confirmation dialog, add error state UI. File: medications/page.tsx. Est: Medium.

title: M3-T3: Build medication management and stock module (catalog, stock tracking, low-stock alerts, expiration)
Payments list: Fix missing pagination (hardcoded per_page: 30)
description: Payments list page (payments/page.tsx) has per_page: 30 hardcoded with no pagination controls. Only first 30 payments display. KPI summary cards computed from first 30 results only (should use server-side aggregates). Fix: Add pagination controls, use server-side KPI endpoint. Est: Medium.

title: Appointments: Fix calendar end-of-month bug (hardcoded day 28)
description: Appointments page line 118 hardcodes calendar end date as 'yyyy-MM-28', missing days 29-31 of any month. Appointments on the 29th-31st are invisible in calendar view. File: app/[locale]/(doctor)/doctor/appointments/page.tsx. Fix: Use proper end-of-month calculation. Est: Small.

title: Dashboard: Wire up real data fetching and chart components
description: Dashboard page (app/[locale]/(doctor)/doctor/dashboard/page.tsx) rated Critical. Entire KPI grid is hardcoded with placeholder dashes ('--', '-- MAD'). No data fetching, no loading state, no error handling, no error boundary. AreaChartWidget, BarChartWidget, PieChartWidget exist but are not imported. useTranslations imported but never used. Not using StatCard or PageHeader components. Missing: real data fetching from dashboard API, charts (appointment trends, revenue, demographics), quick actions section, today's schedule widget, recent patients widget. Est: Large.

title: Invoices new: Fix patient list loading only page 1
description: New Invoice page (invoices/new/page.tsx) loads patient list from page 1 only. Doctors with many patients can't access all of them in the patient selector. No error handling on form submission (no try/catch around mutateAsync). Fix: Implement patient search/typeahead instead of loading full list. Est: Medium.

title: M5-T3: Implement offline PWA support (next-pwa, IndexedDB, offline queue via zustand, conflict resolution)
Error handling: Add isError checks and ErrorState component to all pages
description: GX-2: No page checks isError from TanStack Query hooks. API failures show either infinite spinners or misleading 'not found' messages. No distinction between 404 and 500 errors. Affects all list and detail pages. Fix: Add isError/error destructuring to every hook usage, create shared <ErrorState> component with retry button, differentiate 404 vs 500 responses. Scope: All page.tsx files. Est: Medium.

title: Rename push_notifications table to notifications and add channel column
description: PRD 17.1 lists table as 'notifications'. Current table is 'push_notifications'. Add channel enum (push|inapp|email|sms) for future multi-channel support per PRD section 13.

title: Implement all 4 Assistant controllers (limited access scope)
description: AssistantAppointmentController: full scheduling CRUD + created_by. AssistantPatientController: CRUD limited fields (no medical history). AssistantPaymentController: record payments + receipts + invoice_id. AssistantExpenseController: CRUD + receipt upload. All must enforce assistant role permissions via middleware.

title: M1-T4: Configure Backblaze B2 file storage with Spatie Medialibrary and pre-signed URLs
Confirmation dialogs: Add AlertDialog for all destructive actions
description: GX-10: No AlertDialog usage anywhere. Delete hooks exist but are unused across multiple pages: useDeletePatient (patient detail), useDeletePrescription (prescription detail), useDeleteConsultation (consultation detail). No confirmation before any destructive action. Fix: Create delete confirmation patterns using shadcn AlertDialog, apply to all detail pages. Est: Medium.

title: M4-T2: Implement doctor-patient linking (3 scenarios: existing app user, invitation SMS, physical-only)
Prescriptions list: Fix missing pagination (hardcoded page 1)
description: Prescriptions list page (prescriptions/page.tsx) has page: 1 hardcoded and meta pagination data is never used. Only first page of prescriptions ever displays. Fix: Implement pagination controls using meta from API response. Est: Small.

title: Implement Doctor::AppointmentController with conflict detection and reminders
description: CRUD + unique slot conflict detection + status workflow (en_attente→confirme→en_cours→termine/annule/absent) + created_by FK + booking_source + OneSignal reminder triggers (24h/1h).

title: M1-T7: Create base UI component library (shadcn/ui, React Hook Form + Zod, TanStack Query, Axios)
Documents list: Replace custom tabs with shadcn Tabs component
description: Documents list (documents/page.tsx) uses custom tab implementation instead of shadcn Tabs — lacks ARIA roles and keyboard navigation. Also: wire ?tab= query param to page state (currently ignored). Fix: Replace with shadcn Tabs, add ARIA tab roles, handle tab query param. Est: Small.

title: Create API Resource classes for JSON response formatting
description: Resources needed: PatientResource, AppointmentResource, ConsultationResource, CertificateResource, PrescriptionResource, PaymentResource, InvoiceResource, MedicationResource, ExpenseResource, MedicalReportResource, ExpertiseResource, EvolutionResource, StatisticsResource. Each with proper field mapping and nested relationships.

title: M4-T1: Build patient mobile registration and authentication (JWT, Expo Secure Store, 30-day refresh)
Invoice detail: Add status change actions (Emettre, Marquer payee, Annuler)
description: Invoice detail page (invoices/[id]/page.tsx) has no actions beyond printing. Missing: status change workflow (Emettre, Marquer payee, Annuler), edit invoice (for drafts), create linked payment button, audit trail. Fix: Add status transition buttons with confirmation dialogs. Est: Medium.

title: i18n: Implement useTranslations() across all 29 doctor pages
description: GX-1: Every user-facing string is hardcoded in French across all 29 pages. The [locale] route segment exists but is ignored. useTranslations() is never called despite NextIntlClientProvider being configured. Arabic RTL and English are completely broken. Fix: Implement useTranslations() in every page, create fr.json, ar.json, en.json translation files. Scope: All page.tsx files + all form components. Est: Large.

title: Reports: Use CSS variables for chart colors (dark mode support)
description: Reports page (reports/page.tsx): Pie chart colors are hardcoded hex values that won't adapt to dark mode. No loading indicator on 'Actualiser' button. useTopProcedures not bound to date range. PDF export has no loading state. Date formatting hardcoded to French locale. Fix: Use CSS variables for chart colors, add loading states. Est: Small.

title: M2-T6: Build medical certificates module (repos/aptitude/custom types, auto-numbering, PDF with stamp area)
Add medication_stock_history table for stock audit trail
description: PRD 6.5 implies stock tracking. Current medications table tracks current qty but no history of stock changes (purchase, usage, loss, adjustment). Need migration: id, medication_id, qty_before, qty_after, action, reason, created_by, created_at.

title: Documents: Wire ?tab= query param and fix redirect from new expertise
description: Documents page ignores ?tab=expertises query parameter. New Expertise form redirects with ?tab=expertises but the documents page doesn't read it — always shows default tab. Also: contenu field is optional but no helper text explains why. Fix: Read and apply tab query param on documents page mount. Est: Small.

title: M1-T2: Implement authentication system (Sanctum + JWT, bcrypt, Spatie roles)
M2-T2: Build appointment system (FullCalendar, conflict detection, status workflow, walk-in support)
M1-T6: Set up React Native Expo + Gluestack UI + NativeWind mobile scaffold
StatCard: Add isLoading prop with built-in skeleton state
description: StatCard component (components/ui/stat-card.tsx) has no built-in loading state. Dashboard and list pages have to handle loading states separately. Some pages (Reports) use raw divs instead of StatCard. Fix: Add isLoading prop to StatCard. Est: Small.

title: Error boundaries: Create error.tsx files for all route segments
description: GX-3: No error.tsx files exist in entire doctor space. Unhandled runtime errors crash the page with a white screen. Fix: Create error.tsx in (doctor)/doctor/ and in each module folder. Est: Small.

title: Implement all 5 Patient mobile controllers
description: PatientAuthController: already done. PatientAppointmentController: booking + cancellation + cross-doctor list. PatientDocumentController: view prescriptions/certificates + upload analyses. PatientDoctorController: linking (3 scenarios) + permissions management. PatientProfileController: profile CRUD + preferences + photo upload.

title: M5-T6: Deploy to production and go live (Hostinger VPS, Cloudflare CDN, SSL, Horizon, backups)
Add full-text search index on patients.nom_complet for Meilisearch/Scout
description: PRD 6.1 requires fast search by Name, Phone, CIN. Phone and CIN indexes exist. Composite index on tenant_id+nom_complet added but full-text index via Scout/Meilisearch also needed for fuzzy name search.

title: Implement Doctor financial controllers: PaymentController + InvoiceController
description: PaymentController: CRUD + invoice_id FK + payment methods (espece/carte/assurance) + partial payments (reste_a_payer) + receipt generation. InvoiceController: CRUD + invoice_items + auto-numbering FACT-YYYY-XXXX + HT/TVA/TTC calculation + PDF A4 and ticket formats.

title: Patient detail: Replace img tag with next/image and fix non-functional buttons
description: Patient detail page (patients/[id]/page.tsx): uses raw instead of next/image for photo. 'Nouvelle consultation' button has no onClick handler. Consent status not actionable (no button to record consent). Photo upload has no loading indicator. Fix: Use next/image, wire consultation button, add consent action. Est: Small.

title: Extract shared constants: STATUT_LABELS, CATEGORY_LABELS, and Zod schemas
description: Multiple duplication issues: STATUT_LABELS and STATUT_VARIANTS duplicated between invoices list and invoice detail. CATEGORY_LABELS slightly different between expenses list and form. Zod schema duplicated between medications new and edit pages. Fix: Extract to shared constants files and shared schema modules. Est: Small.

title: DataTable: Add pagination, sorting, and filtering support
description: GX-7: DataTable component (components/ui/data-table.tsx) has no pagination, sorting, filtering, or search. No keyboard accessibility on clickable rows. Affects ALL list pages (patients, appointments, consultations, prescriptions, certificates, payments, invoices, expenses, medications, documents). Fix: Upgrade DataTable with TanStack Table wrapper supporting pagination/sort/filter/search, add ARIA attributes (aria-label, aria-busy), responsive strategy (column hiding, card view on mobile), and skeleton row loading states. Est: Large.

title: M2-T3: Build consultation management module (24 fields: vitals, HbA1c, glycemia, lipid panel, glucosuria)
Breadcrumbs: Create component and integrate with PageHeader
description: GX-4: No breadcrumb component exists in the project. All sub-pages rely on router.back() which is unreliable. Fix: Create components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx, add breadcrumb support to PageHeader component. Apply to all detail, edit, and new pages across all modules. Est: Medium.

title: Certificates new: Add auto-calculation of nombre_jours from date range
description: New Certificate form (certificates/new/page.tsx): nombre_jours auto-calculation missing (should compute from date_debut to date_fin). Also missing FormMessage on date_debut, date_fin, nombre_jours, date_certificat fields. Missing template system for pre-filling content by certificate type. Est: Small.

title: Create Form Request validation classes for all API endpoints
description: Requests needed: StorePatientRequest, UpdatePatientRequest, StoreAppointmentRequest, StoreConsultationRequest, StoreCertificateRequest, StorePrescriptionRequest, StorePaymentRequest, StoreInvoiceRequest, StoreMedicationRequest, StoreExpenseRequest, StoreMedicalReportRequest, StoreExpertiseRequest, StoreEvolutionRequest. Mirror Zod schemas for frontend.

title: M3-T2: Build invoice generation module (FACT-2026-XXXX numbering, A4/ticket formats, HT/TVA/TTC, PDF)
Forms: Standardize Invoices and Expenses forms on shadcn Form/FormField/FormMessage
description: New Invoice and New Expense forms use raw Label/Input instead of shadcn Form/FormField/FormMessage (inconsistent with other forms). Missing FormMessage components on several fields. Fix: Refactor to use consistent shadcn Form patterns, add FormMessage to all fields. Affected: invoices/new/page.tsx, expenses/new/page.tsx. Est: Medium.

title: KPI calculations: Move to server-side aggregates for Payments, Expenses, and Medications
description: Multiple list pages compute KPI summaries client-side from paginated results only — producing inaccurate totals. Affected: Payments (computed from first 30 results), Expenses (computed from current page only), Medications (fetches 200 records for counts). Fix: Create/use dedicated server-side aggregate endpoints for KPI data. Est: Medium.

title: Create ExpenseCategorySeeder with default categories (Loyer, Utilitaires, Fournitures, Equipement, Salaires)
description: PRD 6.12 lists rent, utilities, supplies, equipment as default expense categories. expense_categories table exists but has no seed data.

title: Appointments: Fix missing patient selector in AppointmentForm
description: AppointmentForm has patient_id required by Zod schema but no form field renders for it — user cannot pick a patient. This makes appointment creation completely non-functional. Fix: Add patient search/select combobox to AppointmentForm. File: components/appointments/appointment-form.tsx. Est: Medium.

title: Fix login response parsing: unwrap nested data wrapper
description: API returns { data: { user, token }, message } but frontend destructures user/token from top level. mutationFn returns res.data but should return res.data.data. This causes user=undefined, crashing setAuth and showing invalid credentials toast despite 200 response.

title: DoctorSidebar: Fix locale-aware links and add ARIA attributes
description: DoctorSidebar (components/layouts/DoctorSidebar.tsx) uses next/link instead of next-intl Link — all sidebar navigation broken for ar/en locales. No ARIA attributes (role=navigation, aria-expanded, aria-label). Hardcoded 'Medecin' role label not translated. h-4.5 w-4.5 may not be valid Tailwind classes. Logout redirects to /login without locale prefix. Fix: Use next-intl Link, add ARIA navigation roles, translate labels. Est: Small.

title: Fix CSRF token mismatch in API auth
description: Removed statefulApi() from bootstrap/app.php and set withCredentials: false in frontend Axios config. API uses Bearer token auth, not cookie-based, so CSRF validation was causing conflicts.

title: M3-T4: Build cabinet expense tracking module (categories, supplier management, monthly summaries, receipts)
Sidebar: Add full ARIA navigation attributes and keyboard navigation
description: DoctorSidebar has no ARIA attributes: missing role=navigation, aria-expanded, aria-label on nav items. No keyboard navigation support. Fix: Add proper ARIA roles, keyboard nav (arrow keys, enter/space). Est: Small.

title: Add consultation_custom_fields table for future specialty-agnostic support
description: PRD 6.3 note: specialty-specific fields will be stored in consultation_custom_fields table for future specialty expansion. Not blocking V1 (diabetology fields are hardcoded) but needed for multi-specialty.

title: Implement Doctor document controllers: CertificateController + PrescriptionController
description: CertificateController: CRUD + auto-numbering + PDF generation (DomPDF with cabinet branding) + patient notification. PrescriptionController: CRUD + prescription_items with medication_id FK + is_template/template_name support + PDF ordonnance generation.
